MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-24-2023 IN DEPT. 206 -- APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY MONICA LA, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF GAYLE AND FRED MATSUMOTO; DAVID B. BURNETT, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS MILES LUCAS, ET AL. -- DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS TENTATIVELY GRANTED AND IS CONTINUED FROM OCT-24-2023 TO OCT-31-2023, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206, FOR PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A NEW TRIAL DATE. THE 10/31/23 HEARING WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AND APPEARANCE WON'T BE NECESSARY UPON PARTIES' SUBMISSION OF A STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER BY 10/30/23. ALL PARTIES MUST EMAIL ADRCOORDINATOR@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN SIX (6) WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
